actions.name: Anchor Shot
actions.description: Effect: On hit, the user freely rolls an @Affliction[grapple] check against the target at +40. On a success, the target also gains @Affliction[bound]. This @Affliction[bound] effect can only be removed with a Difficult Movement-related Skill, Lift, or Handiwork Skill Check taken as a Simple Action. If either the @Affliction[grapple] or @Affliction[bound] condition ends, the target loses the other Affliction.
